rewrite_purpose: Guide reviewers to add AI-generated or illustration disclaimers for synthetic or rendered advertising imagery.
summary: Add clear AI-rendered or illustration-only disclaimer when synthetic imagery could be mistaken for real photography.
rewrite_guidance: TRIGGER: AI-generated models, synthetic imagery, or illustration-style product renders. ACTION: Add visible AI/synthetic media or illustration disclaimer. CHECK: Visual realism, likeness rights, and disclosure placement. ESCALATE IF: Synthetic human likeness without consent.
review_guidance: ESCALATE IF: Disclosure is buried or illegible at typical mobile ad resolution.

measurable_criteria.scoring_notes: must_include_concepts checked on playbook rewrite guidance text.

rewrite_independence_rationale: Standalone AI/illustration disclosure rewrite guidance; independent of claim-class skill entries.
